kiosk.Title: Stanton Airport
kiosk.Summary: A small, community‑focused airfield serving Powell County and the RRG region, providing general aviation access & pilot services.

kiosk.Title: Gorge Shuttle
kiosk.Summary: Gorge Shuttle is a local transportation service offering convenient, hop‑on access to key trailheads, overlooks, and attractions throughout the Red River Gorge, providing an easy, car‑free way to explore the Natural Bridge and Slade area.

kiosk.Title: Junior Williamson Rest Area
kiosk.Summary: A well‑maintained roadside stop along the Mountain Parkway, offering clean facilities, picnic areas, vending, and brochures for travelers heading to or from the RRG & surrounding communities.
